{{nihongo|'''Tatsutahiko & Tatsutahimeno Shrine'''|竜田比古竜田比女神社 二社 （龍田比古龍田比女神社 二社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Tatsutahiko & Tatsutahimeno Shrine'''|竜田比古竜田比女神社 二社 （龍田比古龍田比女神社 二社）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].
